title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Castle Hill, Bronx | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Castle Hill, Bronx. Safe, humane bat extraction from homes and buildings. Licensed specialists. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Castle Hill residents facing bat infestations need immediate, professional intervention to protect their homes and health. Our expert bat removal and exclusion services safely eliminate bat colonies from attics, chimneys, and wall voids while preventing future re-entry. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective solutions tailored to Castle Hill's unique residential architecture.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of bat removal expertise to Castle Hill, utilizing state-of-the-art exclusion techniques that comply with all NYC wildlife regulations. Our licensed technicians provide comprehensive inspections, humane removal, thorough cleanup, and guaranteed exclusion work to ensure your Castle Hill home remains bat-free for years to come.
localContext: Castle Hill's mix of single-family homes, brick rowhouses, and pre-war apartment buildings near Castle Hill Avenue and the waterfront creates numerous entry points where bats commonly roost. The neighborhood's proximity to parks and Pugsley Creek Park provides ideal bat habitats, making professional exclusion essential for protecting Castle Hill properties from repeated infestations.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Castle Hill typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of damage. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in NYC regulated?
faqs.answer: Yes, bat removal in New York City must follow specific wildlife protection laws. Bats cannot be harmed or removed during maternity season (typically May through August). Our licensed technicians use only legal, humane exclusion methods that allow bats to exit but prevent re-entry, ensuring full compliance with all regulations.

faqs.question: How long does the bat exclusion process take in Castle Hill homes?
faqs.answer: The complete bat exclusion process typically takes 2-5 days for initial installation, followed by a monitoring period of 3-7 days to ensure all bats have vacated. After confirmation, we seal all entry points permanently. The timeline varies based on colony size and your home's specific structural challenges.

faqs.question: Do you clean up bat droppings and damage after removal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our comprehensive service includes safe removal of bat guano, contaminated insulation replacement, attic sanitization, and odor elimination. Bat droppings can harbor harmful fungi, so we use protective equipment and EPA-approved disinfectants to thoroughly decontaminate affected areas in your Castle Hill property.
